title: Analytics - Login Success
scenario: Poly account login event logged with analytics metadata in Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app on the mobile device.
2. On the Home screen, tap the Account icon or navigate to the Account section.
3. Tap the 'Sign In' or 'Log In' button.
4. Enter valid Poly account credentials (email and password).
5. Tap the 'Sign In' or 'Log In' button to submit the credentials.
6. Observe the app behavior upon successful authentication.
expected: The user is successfully logged into their Poly account. The app navigates to the Home screen and displays the user's account information. The login event is logged with default analytics elements including: event graph, events in last 30 minutes, event count by country, event count by gender, events per session, app version, app build, app environment, screen name, user type, and action metadata.
